goals: Check what memories are currently stored about the user
Store a preference about how they want information presented
Search for stored context about a specific topic to verify retrieval works
Remove an unnecessary or unwanted memory

user_agent_config.personality: Skeptical and curious. Prefers direct, factual information without fluff or religious undertones. Tests systems to understand how they work.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Understands basic memory concepts but does not know internal tool names or APIs. Treats the memory system as a novel technology to explore.

end_condition: The user has added a preference, verified search functionality works, and cleaned up unwanted memories to their satisfaction.
